description: Bbox + labels → GeoJSON FeatureCollection per label, read from the latest (or pinned-generation) com.etzhayyim.substrate.shardSnapshot for shardKey = 'com.etzhayyim.maps.feature'. Server resolves the snapshot → fetches the MST root from IPFS (Phase 2) or the JSON manifest (Phase 1) → walks the MST / scans matching partitions → emits GeoJSON. Bbox parameters are integer microdegrees (×1e7) to match the record schema. ADR-2605202300.

labels.description: Feature labels to include (Building / Road / River / ...). Empty = all.

h3Resolution.description: Hint for the H3 resolution the reader expects (zoom-derived). Server may pick the closest available index.

snapshotRkey.description: Optional rkey of a specific com.etzhayyim.substrate.shardSnapshot to read against (time-travel). Absent = latest.

layers.description: GeoJSON FeatureCollection per label, encoded as JSON string ({"Building": {...}, "Road": {...}}). String-encoded so the AT lexicon does not need to model deeply-nested float arrays.

truncated.description: True if the result was capped by limit.

errors.name: SnapshotNotFound
errors.description: No shardSnapshot exists for shardKey = com.etzhayyim.maps.feature (or for the supplied snapshotRkey).

errors.name: BboxTooLarge
errors.description: The requested bbox exceeds the per-query area cap configured for this appview.

phase.description: 1 = JSON manifest, 2 = MST CAR. Mirrors shardSnapshot.phase.

snapshotCid.description: IPFS CID of the snapshot blob (JSON manifest or CAR).

snapshotHash.description: Phase 1 sha256 hash; absent when phase=2.
